patches_added.name: Remove Ads
patches_added.description: Blocks all ad display in Provide Lite by forcing the app's central ad gate (in libapp.so) to always take its 'skip' path. Two branch instructions are rewritten to unconditional skips: the global 'ad enabled' flag check (tbz -> b #skip) and the interstitial/rewarded cooldown gate (b.ge -> b #skip). Verified on v1.4.6 (Dart 3.7.0, arm64, obfuscated) — no ad-show invocation is reached.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Patches the Dart AOT-compiled libapp.so to unlock all premium / VIP features. Forces the VIP state to always be true by rewriting the constant-pool loads (add xN, x22, #0x30 -> add xN, x22, #0x20) inside the cacheIsVipKey readers (getter + 3 callers). Verified on v1.4.6 (Dart 3.7.0, arm64, obfuscated) — flutter.cacheIsVipKey=true on device.
